node_context: 9 classical hippocampal GABAergic interneuron types: PV+ basket cell (soma SP), CCK+ basket cell (soma SP), axo-axonic/chandelier cell (soma SP), bistratified cell (soma SP, axon SO+SR), OLM cell (soma SO, axon SLM), hippocampo-septal cell (soma SO), neurogliaform cell (soma SLM), ivy cell (soma SP), IS interneuron (soma SO/SR/SLM). All GABAergic. Key unresolved: (1) soma layer confirmed by morphology for bistratified/IS cells; (2) transcriptomic datasets with multimodal bridge to classical types (patch-seq, MERFISH+IHC, multiplexed FISH); (3) IS interneuron subtype split (IS-1 CR+/VIP-, IS-2 VIP+/CR-, IS-3 CR+/VIP+) with layer-specific soma locations; (4) conflicting marker assertions (PV+ OLM subpopulation, Ndnf protein vs Cre-driver, Tac1 protein vs intersectional genetics for bistratified, Nos1 universality in NGC vs IvC); (5) hippocampo-septal cell primary characterisation.
query: hippocampal GABAergic interneuron soma location layer morphology transcriptomics patch-seq multimodal classification
